showFullCode.title: Show Complete File
showFullCode.description: Show complete file for code, with bootstrap and error handling included.

CourseTimelineClassification.title: CourseTimelineClassification
CourseTimelineClassification.description: Timeline classification filter for enrolled courses.

CourseTimelineSortField.title: CourseTimelineSortField
CourseTimelineSortField.description: Field used to sort enrolled course results.

UserProfileField.title: UserProfileField
UserProfileField.description: User profile field to match against when searching for users.

MoodleWarning.title: MoodleWarning
MoodleWarning.description: A non-fatal warning returned alongside a successful response.

item.description: Item identifier related to the warning; empty string if not applicable.

itemid.description: Numeric item ID related to the warning; 0 if not applicable.

warningcode.description: Machine-readable warning code; empty string if no code.

SiteNotification.title: SiteNotification
SiteNotification.description: A site-level notification (structure varies by type).

id.description: Unique identifier for the site notification.

MoodleError.title: MoodleError
MoodleError.description: Error returned by the LMS on a failed operation.

message.example: Can't find data record in database table.

link.description: Redirect URL for the user; empty string if not applicable.

moreinfourl.description: URL to additional error documentation; empty string if not available.

debuginfo.description: Additional debug information; empty string when not in debug mode.

fullname.description: Full display name of the course.
fullname.example: CS-212 Object Oriented Programming BSCS-13 2K23 ABC

shortname.description: Short course code or abbreviated name.

idnumber.description: Institution-assigned course ID number; empty string if not set.

summaryformat.description: Format of the summary field (1 = HTML).

startdate.description: Course start date as Unix timestamp.

enddate.description: Course end date as Unix timestamp. 0 means no end date.

visible.description: Whether the course is visible to enrolled students.

fullnamedisplay.description: Display name of the course (may differ from fullname for context).
fullnamedisplay.example: CS-212 Object Oriented Programming BSCS-13 2K23 ABC

viewurl.description: URL to the course page on the LMS portal.

progress.description: Student's completion progress as a percentage.

hasprogress.description: Whether completion tracking is enabled for this course.

isfavourite.description: Whether the user has marked this course as a favourite.

hidden.description: Whether the user has hidden this course from their dashboard.

showshortname.description: Whether the short name is displayed alongside the full name.

coursecategory.description: Name of the category this course belongs to.

RecentCourseFields.title: RecentCourseFields
RecentCourseFields.description: Additional fields specific to recently accessed courses.

timeaccess.description: Unix timestamp of the user's most recent access to this course.

RecentCourse.title: RecentCourse
RecentCourse.description: A recently accessed course, extending Course with the last-access timestamp.

fullname.description: Full display name of the course.
fullname.example: CS-212 Object Oriented Programming BSCS-13 2K23 ABC

shortname.description: Short course code or abbreviated name.

idnumber.description: Institution-assigned course ID number; empty string if not set.

summaryformat.description: Format of the summary field (1 = HTML).

startdate.description: Course start date as Unix timestamp.

enddate.description: Course end date as Unix timestamp. 0 means no end date.

visible.description: Whether the course is visible to enrolled students.

fullnamedisplay.description: Display name of the course (may differ from fullname for context).
fullnamedisplay.example: CS-212 Object Oriented Programming BSCS-13 2K23 ABC

viewurl.description: URL to the course page on the LMS portal.

progress.description: Student's completion progress as a percentage.

hasprogress.description: Whether completion tracking is enabled for this course.

isfavourite.description: Whether the user has marked this course as a favourite.

hidden.description: Whether the user has hidden this course from their dashboard.

showshortname.description: Whether the short name is displayed alongside the full name.

coursecategory.description: Name of the category this course belongs to.

timeaccess.description: Unix timestamp of the user's most recent access to this course.

courses.description: List of enrolled courses for the current page.

nextoffset.description: Offset to pass on the next page request; -1 when no further pages exist.

EventIcon.title: EventIcon
EventIcon.description: Icon metadata for a calendar event.

key.description: Icon key name used to locate the icon asset.

component.description: Moodle component that owns the icon (e.g., 'assign').

alttext.description: Accessible alt text for the icon image.

EventSubscription.title: EventSubscription
EventSubscription.description: Subscription display settings for a calendar event.

displayeventsource.description: Whether to display the event source label on the calendar.

EventAction.title: EventAction
EventAction.description: Primary action button metadata for a calendar event.

name.description: Display label for the primary action button.

url.description: URL the user should navigate to in order to perform the action.

itemcount.description: Number of items associated with this action.

actionable.description: Whether the action can currently be taken by the user.

showitemcount.description: Whether to display the item count alongside the action label.

CalendarEvent.title: CalendarEvent
CalendarEvent.description: A calendar action event tied to a course activity (e.g., an assignment deadline).

name.description: Display name of the calendar event.

description.description: HTML description body of the event.

descriptionformat.description: Text format of the description (1 = HTML).

location.description: Physical or virtual location of the event; empty string if not specified.

categoryid.description: Course category ID; null if not a category event.

groupid.description: Group ID if the event is group-specific; null otherwise.

userid.description: User ID if the event is user-specific; null otherwise.

repeatid.description: ID of the repeat group for recurring events; null if not recurring.

eventcount.description: Total number of events in the repeat group; null if not applicable.

component.description: Moodle component that created the event (e.g., 'mod_assign').

modulename.description: Short name of the Moodle activity module (e.g., 'assign').

timestart.description: Event start time as Unix timestamp.

timeduration.description: Duration in seconds; 0 for point-in-time events.

timesort.description: Sort timestamp used for ordering events.

visible.description: Visibility flag for a calendar event. 1 means the event is visible; 0 means it is hidden.

timemodified.description: Last modification time as Unix timestamp.

canedit.description: Whether the current user can edit this event.

candelete.description: Whether the current user can delete this event.

deleteurl.description: URL to delete this calendar event.

editurl.description: URL to edit the underlying course module associated with this event.

viewurl.description: URL to view this event on the calendar.

isactionevent.description: Whether this is an action event requiring user interaction.

iscourseevent.description: Whether this event is associated with a specific course.

iscategoryevent.description: Whether this event is associated with a course category.

groupname.description: Name of the group for group-specific events; null otherwise.

normalisedeventtype.description: Normalised event type identifier used for display grouping.

normalisedeventtypetext.description: Human-readable label for the normalised event type.

url.description: Direct URL to the course activity associated with this event.

CalendarEventsResponse.title: CalendarEventsResponse
CalendarEventsResponse.description: A list of calendar events with pagination boundary IDs.

events.description: List of calendar action events for the current result set.

firstid.description: Event ID of the first item in the result set.

lastid.description: Event ID of the last item in the result set.

CustomField.title: CustomField
CustomField.description: A custom profile field value attached to a user.

type.description: Data type of the custom field (e.g., 'text', 'select').

value.description: Value stored in the custom field.

name.description: Display label of the custom field.

shortname.description: Machine-readable shortname identifier for the custom field.

value.description: Preference value as a string. Note that the internal _lastloaded preference is returned as an integer by the LMS.

fullname.description: Full display name of the user.

department.description: Department the user belongs to within the institution.

institution.description: Name of the institution the user is affiliated with.

idnumber.description: Institution-assigned student or staff ID number.

auth.description: Authentication method used by the user (e.g., 'ldap', 'manual').

confirmed.description: Whether the user's account has been confirmed.

theme.description: Preferred LMS theme; empty string means use the site default.

timezone.description: Timezone identifier. "99" means use the server default.

profileimageurlsmall.description: URL to the user's small profile image (thumbnail).

profileimageurl.description: URL to the user's full-size profile image.

customfields.description: List of custom profile field values for the user.

preferences.description: List of stored preference key/value pairs for the user.

UserPreferencesResponse.title: UserPreferencesResponse
UserPreferencesResponse.description: Response envelope for the user-preferences endpoint.

preferences.description: List of user preference key/value pairs.

warnings.description: Array of warning objects. Empty when no warnings are present.

Notification.title: Notification
Notification.description: A popup notification message delivered to a user.

shortenedsubject.description: Shortened version of the notification subject for compact display.

text.description: Short HTML excerpt of the notification.

fullmessage.description: Full plain-text body of the notification.

fullmessageformat.description: Format identifier for fullmessagehtml (2 = Markdown source).

fullmessagehtml.description: Full HTML body of the notification email.

smallmessage.description: Short plain-text preview of the notification.
smallmessage.example: Areeba Rameen posted in CS-419-Deep Learning...

contexturl.description: URL to the relevant context for this notification (e.g., a forum post).

contexturlname.description: Human-readable label for the context URL link.
contexturlname.example: Lab Sessional Finalization - (DL - Section D & E)

timecreated.description: Unix timestamp when the notification was created.

timecreatedpretty.description: Human-readable relative time string (e.g., '19 days ago').

timeread.description: Unix timestamp when the notification was read; null if unread.

read.description: Whether the notification has been read by the recipient.

deleted.description: Whether the notification has been deleted by the recipient.

iconurl.description: URL to the icon image representing the notification source.

component.description: Moodle component that generated the notification (e.g., 'mod_forum').

eventtype.description: Event type within the component that triggered the notification (e.g., 'posts').

customdata.description: JSON-encoded string with additional notification metadata (cmid, instance, discussionid, postid, etc.).

PopupNotificationsResponse.title: PopupNotificationsResponse
PopupNotificationsResponse.description: Response envelope for the popup-notifications endpoint.

notifications.description: List of popup notifications for the user.

unreadcount.description: Total number of unread notifications for the user.

GetRecentCoursesRequest.title: GetRecentCoursesRequest
GetRecentCoursesRequest.description: Request parameters for retrieving recently accessed courses.

limit.description: Maximum number of courses to return.

GetEnrolledCoursesByTimelineRequest.title: GetEnrolledCoursesByTimelineRequest
GetEnrolledCoursesByTimelineRequest.description: Request parameters for retrieving enrolled courses filtered by timeline classification.

limit.description: Maximum number of courses to return.

FetchNotificationsRequest.title: FetchNotificationsRequest
FetchNotificationsRequest.description: Request parameters for fetching site-level notifications.

contextid.description: Moodle context ID for which to fetch notifications. The user context ID can be found in the user profile image URL path segment.

GetCalendarEventsByTimesortRequest.title: GetCalendarEventsByTimesortRequest
GetCalendarEventsByTimesortRequest.description: Request parameters for retrieving calendar action events sorted by time.

limitnum.description: Maximum number of events to return.

timesortfrom.description: Only return events with timesort >= this Unix timestamp. Pass 0 for no lower bound.

timesortto.description: Only return events with timesort <= this Unix timestamp. Optional.

aftereventid.description: Return events whose ID is greater than this value (cursor pagination). Optional.

GetCalendarEventsByCourseRequest.title: GetCalendarEventsByCourseRequest
GetCalendarEventsByCourseRequest.description: Request parameters for retrieving calendar action events for a specific course.

courseid.description: ID of the course to fetch events for.

timesortfrom.description: Only return events with timesort >= this Unix timestamp. Optional.

timesortto.description: Only return events with timesort <= this Unix timestamp. Optional.

aftereventid.description: Cursor-based pagination — return events after this event ID. Optional.

limitnum.description: Maximum number of events to return. Optional.

GetUsersByFieldRequest.title: GetUsersByFieldRequest
GetUsersByFieldRequest.description: Request parameters for retrieving user profiles by a profile field value.

values.description: List of field values to look up. All values must be provided as strings even when the field is numeric (e.g., "162154" for an integer ID).

GetUserPreferencesRequest.title: GetUserPreferencesRequest
GetUserPreferencesRequest.description: Request parameters for retrieving user preferences.

userid.description: ID of the user whose preferences to retrieve.

name.description: Specific preference name to retrieve. Omit to retrieve all preferences.

GetPopupNotificationsRequest.title: GetPopupNotificationsRequest
GetPopupNotificationsRequest.description: Request parameters for retrieving popup notifications for a user.

useridto.description: ID of the recipient user, passed as a string.

limit.description: Maximum number of notifications to return.

sesskey.description: Session key obtained after authenticating with the LMS portal.

Title: Getting Started with NUST LMS API

Nodes.Text: NUST Learning Management System API for developer integrations (Moodle AJAX wrapper). Each path is virtual for clean SDK generation; NustDevKit resolves them to the underlying Moodle AJAX service endpoint transparently.
The SDK requires **Go version 1.18 or above**.
Resolve all the SDK dependencies, using the `go get` command.
The following section explains how to use the nustLmsApi library in a new project.
- Add the following lines to your application's `go.mod` file:

```go
replace nustLmsApi => ".\\Random Directory" // local path to the SDK

require nustLmsApi v0.0.0
```
- Resolve the dependencies in the updated `go.mod` file, using the `go get` command.

Nodes.Text: Usage Example
Client Initialization with Custom Logger

In order to provide custom logger, any implementation of the `LoggerInterface` can be used so that you can override the `Log` behavior and provide its instance directly in the SDK client initialization.
The following example uses [`Logrus`](https://pkg.go.dev/github.com/sirupsen/logrus) implementation of `LoggerInterface` for NustLmsApiClient initialization.

Nodes.Text: The following parameters are configurable for the RetryConfiguration:
Properties

Data:
Whether to retry on request timeout.
*Default*: `true`

Interval before next retry. Used in calculation of wait time for next request in case of failure.
*Default*: `1`

Overall wait time for the requests getting retried.
*Default*: `0`

Used in calculation of wait time for next request in case of failure.
*Default*: `2`

Nodes.Text: The retryConfiguration can be initialized as follows:

```go
package main

import (
    "nustLmsApi"
)

func main() {
    retryConfiguration := nustLmsApi.CreateRetryConfiguration(
        nustLmsApi.WithMaxRetryAttempts(0),
        nustLmsApi.WithRetryOnTimeout(true),
        nustLmsApi.WithRetryInterval(1),
        nustLmsApi.WithMaximumRetryWaitTime(0),
        nustLmsApi.WithBackoffFactor(2),
        nustLmsApi.WithHttpStatusCodesToRetry([]int64{408, 413, 429, 500, 502, 503, 504, 521, 522, 524, 408, 413, 429, 500, 502, 503, 504, 521, 522, 524}),
        nustLmsApi.WithHttpMethodsToRetry([]string{"GET", "PUT", "GET", "PUT"}),
    )
```
